## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `onecrawl ...`
2. Navigate to '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **OS** | e.g., macOS 14.3, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11 |
| **OneCrawl version** | e.g., 3.9.2 |
| **Node.js version** (if using NAPI) | e.g., 20.11.0 |
| **Python version** (if using PyO3) | e.g., 3.12.1 |
| **Rust version** | e.g., 1.76.0 |
| **Chrome/Chromium version** | e.g., 122.0.6261.94 |
